description: Frontend improvements: error boundaries, TanStack Query defaults, typed API layer. Plus README update.
steps: 1. ERROR BOUNDARIES (src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx): Create a reusable ErrorBoundary component using React class component pattern (componentDidCatch). Show a friendly error card with 'Something went wrong' message and a 'Try again' button that calls this.setState to reset. Create src/components/SectionErrorBoundary.tsx that wraps ErrorBoundary with section-specific styling.

2. WRAP MAJOR SECTIONS: In the main layout or router file, wrap major route sections (Dashboard, Inbox, CRM, Ads, Settings, Commerce) with <ErrorBoundary>. Find the router configuration (likely in src/App.tsx or similar) and add error boundaries around lazy-loaded route components.

3. TANSTACK QUERY DEFAULTS (src/lib/query-client.ts or similar): Find where QueryClient is instantiated. Set default options: staleTime: 30000 (30s), gcTime (formerly cacheTime): 5 * 60 * 1000 (5 min), retry: 1, refetchOnWindowFocus: false. If QueryClient is created in a provider component, update it there.

4. TYPE THE FRONTEND API LAYER (src/lib/api.ts): Replace the most common `any` types with proper interfaces. In src/lib/api-types.ts, add interfaces for: Contact, Conversation, Message, Deal, Campaign, Broadcast, Task, Order, OrderItem, Product, Booking, Coupon, ShippingZone, SitePage, Site. Then in api.ts, replace `get<any[]>` with the proper types: listContacts -> get<Contact[]>, listDeals -> get<Deal[]>, etc. Focus on the 10 most-used endpoints. Keep complex or rarely used ones as they are.

5. UPDATE README: Replace the current README.md content with proper project documentation: project name (Addison X Media), description (full-stack CRM + WhatsApp automation + e-commerce platform for Indian SMBs), tech stack list, setup instructions (copy .env.example to .env, fill DATABASE_URL, npm install, npm run dev), available scripts (dev, build, start, test, db:push, db:migrate), project structure overview, deployment notes (Render.com via render.yaml).
acceptance_criteria: ErrorBoundary component exists and is used in the router
QueryClient has sensible staleTime and gcTime defaults
At least 10 api.ts endpoints use typed returns instead of any
README.md has setup instructions, tech stack, and project structure
npm run build succeeds with no errors
verification: Run npm run build to verify frontend compiles
Run npx tsc --noEmit to verify type correctness
findings: ErrorBoundary component and QueryClient defaults were already implemented in prior commits. Typed all remaining any types in api.ts (25+ replacements) and rewrote the README. Zero any types remain in api.ts. Build and tsc --noEmit both pass cleanly.
